body.title: Fix Granny daemon tests — _dispatch_dicksimnel removed, tests stale
body.result: 4 stale test patches updated — cascade/removed symbols; all 23 pass
body.intention: I intend that the Granny daemon test suite reflects the current daemon API and all relevant tests pass.
body.description:
4 tests in test_granny_rules_engine.py patch _dispatch_dicksimnel (removed) and _dispatch_bus (call count wrong). T-granny-rules-engine-test-fix was previously closed but daemon changed again. Fix patches to match current daemon symbols.

**Affected files:** tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — fix TestRunOnce tests patching removed symbols. OUT — changing daemon behavior.
**Completion criteria:** python -m pytest tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py passes with 0 failures.
